## Runtime.Indexers.IIndexOrchestratorConfig type

Configuration for an index orchestrator. A partial record since not all indexers need to be queried at once.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type IIndexOrchestratorConfig = Partial<Record<IndexerId, IIndexerConfig>>;
```
